name: rDNA_chrXII_tandem_array
description: Ribosomal DNA tandem array on S. cerevisiae chromosome XII. Each 9.1 kb RDN1 unit encodes the 18S, 5.8S, and 25S rRNAs in the 35S transcript plus the divergently-transcribed 5S (RDN5) gene; units are separated by NTS1/NTS2 spacers containing the rARS replication origin and RFB (replication fork barrier). The array spans the chromosome XII centre and is the largest tandem repeat in the yeast genome (~150 copies per haploid in W303/S288C; copy number is strain- and growth-phase-variable). sacCer3 collapses the array to a placeholder ~9 kb single unit at chrXII:451575-468931 (RDN1) with the actual array length unrepresented.
expected_copy_count: ~100-200 copies of the 9.1 kb RDN1 unit; strain-variable
